extension_description.message: Native video player for videos or livestreams in DASH (mpd), HLS (m3u8) format and M3U list with EPG support.

welcome_pin_title.message: Remember to pin the extension for easy access to settings

welcome_pin_1.message: Use the puzzle menu on top right of Chrome to pin the extension

welcome_pin_2.message: Once done, you can access the extension settings with one click on the extension icon

welcome_autoplay_subtext.message: The extension will automatically play any link that end with .mpd, .m3u8 or .m3u in the embed player.

settings_ignore_domains.message: List of domains to ignore from the autoplay media links

settings_options_active_title.message:
Open .mpd, .m3u8 or m3u links automatically
in the video player when clicked

settings_options_lowlatency_title.message:
Enable automatic low latency stream detection.

It can be disabled if there are buffering issues.

settings_options_smart_buffer.message: Enable SmartBuffer to prevent stalls during playback

settings_options_smart_buffer_title.message: Enabling this would make the playback change rate to 0.9x for 5sec on stalls to gain extra buffer and prevent future stalls.

settings_options_defaultaudio_title.message:
Default language of audio tracks.

It only works on videos with properly configured audio languages.

settings_options_epg_enabled.message: Enable EPG parser in IPTV Player by default

settings_options_epg_enabled_title.message: Enable the EPG parser by default in the IPTV Player. You can disable to gain performance or if you don't use it.

settings_options_epg_keypress.message: Only show EPG while holding [X] key

settings_options_epg_keypress_title.message:
Only show EPG programmes while holding [X] key.
With this enabled, only the channel names are displayed on mouse hover.

settings_options_epg_days.message: Number of days to show EPG programming

settings_options_epg_days_title.message:
Beware, adding more days could hit performance in low end devices.
Default: 1 day

settings_options_compressor_enabled.message: Enable Audio Gain and Compressor by default

settings_options_compressor_enabled_titl.message: Audio Gain and Compressor help to normalize channels audio and access to more volume than the original.

settings_options_ck_get_bypass_title.message:
Disable GET request to ClearKey license server globally if you want to do POST request only.
Default: Enabled

settings_options_ck_get_bypass.message: Disable GET requests to ClearKey server. Only POST

settings_options_ck_cache_title.message:
Cache ClearKey POST requests during an amount of seconds to prevent repeated requests.
Set to 0 to disable

settings_options_ck_cache.message: Cache ClearKey POST requests in seconds

settings_license_widevine_title.message: Force a custom Widevine license server.

settings_license_clearkey_title.message: Force a list of custom ClearKeys.

settings_license_clearkey_error_key.message: The KeyID $key$ has an invalid key.

settings_save_button.description: Save button under custom ClearKey and Widevine textareas.

settings_saved.description: Message to be displayed when the custom setting is saved.

settings_donor_license_title.message: Add a donor license key to unlock all extension features

settings_donor_license_donate_desc.message: To unlock all extension features you can obtain a donor license key to help the extension development.

settings_donor_license_donate_link.description: Part of the message 'Donate on' PayPal or MercadoPago

settings_donor_license_donate_desc_extra.message: If you have any problems with your license key you can contact me on Discord or Telegram

settings_play_title.message: Play the self hosted M3U playlist.

settings_play_local_title.message: Play M3U playlists directly from the local drive.

settings_edit_title.message: Edit the self hosted M3U playlist.

settings_clearkey_title.message: Utility to convert clearkey formats and generate media urls and m3u lists to use with the extension.

settings_help_title.message: If you have questions about how to use and configure the extension you can read the Wiki.

settings_github_title.message: Report an issue or ask for help on GitHub.

settings_discord_title.message: Report an issue or ask for help in a private ticket on Discord.

settings_telegram_title.message: Report an issue or ask for help in the Telegram group.

settings_review_title.message: If you find the extension useful please help reviewing it.

settings_translate_title.message: Help translating the extension into your language.

settings_changelog_title.message: See the changelog of the extension to know what was changed or added.

settings_access_filesystem.message:
To load file:/// playlists directly or allow drag-and-drop .m3u files,
enable “Allow access to file URLs” in the extension’s settings in Chrome

settings_access_incognito.message:
To use the direct player or IPTV player in Incognito mode,
enable “Allow in Incognito” in the extension’s settings in Chrome

converter_drm_tooltip_clearkey_3.message: URL that returns any of the above formats:

converter_drm_tooltip_clearkey_4.message: If a valid format is not returned by the url then it make a POST to the same url with key ids data in EME spec request format.

converter_drm_tooltip_widevine_cert.message:
Sometimes you need to provide a separate URL for the Widevine certificate
because is not supported by the provider.

converter_result_button_open.message: Open link in a new tab!

license_thank_you.message: Thank you for supporting the extension. All features unlocked.

license_unlock_features.message: Unlock extra features by being a donor and help the extension development.

license_epg.message: Unlock multiple EPGs by adding a donor license key.

license_channels.message: Unlock infinite channels with a donor license key

player_unknown_language.description: Unknown language for audio or subtitle tracks

player_error_no_file_access.message:
To load file:/// playlists directly you need to toggle
Allow access to file URLs in

player_drop_local_playlists.message: Or drop one or multiple M3U playlist here to load

player_paste_playlist.message: Or paste your M3U playlist URL here to load

player_mobile_local_playlists.message: Some browsers handle .m3u files as audio and may request microphone permissions. You can deny the permission without any problems.

player_open_channel_newtab.message: Open channel in a new tab

iptv_deep_search_channels.message: Include program titles in the search

iptv_epg_reminder_title.message: Right-click to open the channel when the program starts
